name: PT Multi Prima Sejahtera Tbk
summary: PT Multi Prima Sejahtera Tbk produces, manufactures, distributes, and sells spark plugs in Indonesia. It also offers automobile and motorcycle spark plugs; machinery, equipment, and paraphernalia; automobile accessories parts; technical activities; and agricultural activities and plant breeding. The company was formerly known as Lippo Enterprises Tbk and changed its name to PT Multi Prima Sejahtera Tbk in 2001. PT Multi Prima Sejahtera Tbk was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia.
